description: You are an agricultural engineer designing a formal demonstration garden for a county extension office. Create a plan-view layout drawing in LibreCAD using meters as the unit. The drawing must include a BOUNDARY layer (color: White/7) with a rectangle from (0, 0) to (12, 9); a BEDS layer (color: Green/3) containing a central elliptical planting bed (center: 6, 4.5; major-axis radius: 3.0, minor-axis radius: 1.8) and four circular corner beds (radius: 0.9) centered at (2,2), (10,2), (2,7), and (10,7); a WALKWAYS layer (color: Yellow/2) with two 1.2m wide cross-axis walkways defined by lines from (5.4, 0) to (5.4, 9), (6.6, 0) to (6.6, 9), (0, 3.9) to (12, 3.9), and (0, 5.1) to (12, 5.1); a FOUNTAIN layer (color: Cyan/4) with a circle at (6, 4.5) and radius 0.45; and a DIMENSIONS layer (color: Red/1) with at least three annotations showing the boundary width (12), boundary height (9), and the ellipse major axis. Save the completed drawing to ~/Documents/LibreCAD/garden_layout.dxf.
